title: PurpleSMP
description: A QOL Modpack viable for the PurpleSMP server..
body:
![PurpleSMP Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/708c3a6c113ba2afbf5d5ceb5e33cdc0bbfa1fa2_0.webp)
The PurpleSMP Modpack is a vanilla-friendly modpack made for our server, however it can be used on most. Please check your servers rules to make sure mods are allowed!

This Modpack includes a selection of quality-of-life enhancements that improve performance, usability, and overall gameplay without altering the core vanilla experience.

 **Features**
- 🗺️ **Minimap** - Gather data on where you've been and set waypoints.
- 🎤 **Voice Chat** - Talk to other players close to you in-game!
- ⚡️ **Shaders** - Make your minecraft look like a modern game.
- ⌨️ **Macros** - Set up a command to be activated in just the click of a button.
- 💡 **Dynamic Lights** - See where you're going without placing torches.
- 📦 **Storage Sorting** - Sort your chests automatically!
- 🔊 **Sound Muffler** - Tired of skeletons or droppers being loud? Mute them.
- 🌱 **QOL Additions** - Things like Eating Animations, Item Physics, More Player Animations, Ect.

Below, you’ll find a complete list of the mods and features included in the PurpleSMP.

<details>
<summary>PurpleSMP Server Content</summary>

### [**McMMO**](https://wiki.mcmmo.org/skills)
> An in depth skill system..
> Double XP for an hour every day at 6pm EST!
- `/swords, /mining, /mctop, /mcrank`
### **Personal Vaults**
> Everybody has access to 1 vault.. 
> Boosters get 2, Supporters get 5.
- `/pv 1, /pv 2`
### **Toggleable PvP**
> By default PvP is off for everyone..
> You can enable/disable PvP at will.
- `/pvp on, /pvp off`
### **Essentials**
> Basic command plugin.
> You get 15 homes by default, boosters get 30, supporters get 45.
- `/sethome, /home, /warp, /tpa, /craft, /back, /rules`
### **Resource Worlds**
> Adds resource worlds that reset every 3 days!
> This helps new players with resource hunting.
- `/rw`
### **Slime Chunks**
> A plugin that shows where slime chunks are.. 
> Everyone gets access to `/slime`
> Boosters get access to `/slimemap`
### **GSit**
> Lets you sit on slabs and stairs by right clicking them!
> You can also run many commands for different actions.
- `/sit, /crawl, /lay, /layback, /spin`
### [**Voice Chat**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/versions)
> Allows proximity chat in-game!
> You must have the mod for this to work.
- `/voicechat invite, /voicechat join, /voicechat leave`
### [**Land Claims**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VDsjXB-BaE0)
> Make sure to claim your land so people don't grief it!
> Select 2 diagonal blocks with a golden shovel and it will claim in a square..
> You start with 2500 claim blocks and receives 150/hour of playtime.
- `/claim, /delclaim, /trust, /untrust`

</details>
